module.name: AIAssistant
module.label: AI Assistant

license.inline: AI Assistant Module for vTiger CRM v0.1.0 Self-evolving AI assistant with hybrid API+CLI architecture.

module.description:
AI Assistant v0.1.0
AI-powered CRM assistant that helps users: - Import leads and contacts - Create workflows and automations - Search and manage records - Get CRM statistics and insights
Self-evolving: automatically builds new capabilities from user requests.
